Headline: Hindenburg Research releases bombshell 106-page report accusing Adani Group of 'brazen stock manipulation and accounting fraud over decades'
Hindenburg alleges Adani used offshore tax havens and shell entities to artificially inflate stock prices and route funds
Report claims Adani companies have 85% downside on fundamental basis; valuations are sky-high and unjustified
Hindenburg discloses short position in Adani stocks; stands to profit if shares fall
Adani Group stocks crash 10% on Day 1; market cap loss Rs 1 lakh crore (~$12 billion); Gautam Adani net worth drops $6.4B to $120B
Adani CFO Jugeshinder Singh denies allegations calling them 'malicious combination of selective misinformation and baseless allegations'
Indian markets closed for Republic Day; Hindenburg stands by report, says Adani failed to respond to 88 questions
Markets reopen - Adani stocks plunge further; group losses reach Rs 4 lakh crore ($48B); Adani drops out of world's top 5 richest
Adani Enterprises FPO sees only 1% subscription on first day amid panic selling
Credit Suisse halts margin loans on Adani bonds as collateral; rating agencies under pressure
Adani Group issues 413-page rebuttal; accuses Hindenburg of 'calculated attack on India' and Indian institutions
Hindenburg rejects Adani response; says 'fraud cannot be covered up by nationalism'
Total Adani Group market cap loss reaches Rs 12 lakh crore ($150 billion) - single largest destruction in Indian stock market history
Abu Dhabi's International Holding Company (IHC) announces $400 million investment to support Adani during crisis
Adani Enterprises FPO closes fully subscribed (1.12x) on final day despite market crash - signals institutional confidence
Gautam Adani loses $50.3 billion in single week; net worth falls from $126.4B to $76.1B; drops to 30th richest globally
Adani Enterprises CANCELS $2.5 billion FPO despite being fully subscribed; decision made to 'protect investors from potential losses'
Stock falls 28.5% on FPO cancellation day; AEL trading at 31.6% below FPO price band floor of Rs 3,112
Forbes reports that companies accused by Hindenburg of facilitating fraud were underwriters in Adani's FPO - intensifies suspicions
Bill Ackman tweets: 'Wouldn't be surprised if Adani offering was rigged with affiliated buyers'; low retail participation (only 12% vs 100% quota)
Credit Suisse stops accepting Adani bonds as collateral for private banking margin loans - major credit event signal
Public Interest Litigation filed in Supreme Court seeking probe by retired SC judge committee into Adani stock crash
Reuters reports SEBI investigating Adani Group's links to investors in aborted $2.5B FPO amid government concern
Supreme Court orders constitution of expert committee headed by retired judge AM Sapre to probe allegations
SC directs SEBI to conclude investigation within 2 months; orders probe into stock price manipulation and regulatory lapses
Adani stocks begin recovery after Supreme Court's reassurance; all 10 listed group companies rally 5-16%
GQG Partners announces $1.87 billion investment in 4 Adani companies - first major institutional backing post-Hindenburg
GQG buys 3.4% AEL, 4.1% APSEZ, 2.5% ATL, 3.5% AGEL; signals institutional confidence despite allegations
Adani Group market cap recovers to Rs 8 lakh crore; Adani Enterprises market cap crosses Rs 2 lakh crore
Adani Enterprises almost tripled from February 2023 low of Rs 1,017; stock at Rs 3,445 erasing all Hindenburg-era losses
Expert committee submits interim report to Supreme Court; recovery continues across Adani Group stocks
SEBI tells Supreme Court it is investigating 13 'suspicious transactions' involving Adani Group companies
Hindenburg founder Anderson confirms investigation profits were just $4.1 million - far less than market rumored
Adani Group statement: Foreign entities like OCCRP, Financial Times, short-sellers launching coordinated attacks with domestic collaborators
Financial Times publishes report recycling allegations - appears day before Supreme Court hearing (pattern noted by Adani)
Supreme Court lawyer Jai Anant Dehadrai files CBI complaint accusing MP Mahua Moitra of conspiracy to harm Adani for bribes from Hiranandani
Adani issues statement on Dehadrai complaint; corroborates allegations of coordinated campaign to 'besmirch reputation'
Supreme Court reserves verdict on all pleas related to Adani-Hindenburg controversy; judgment expected in coming weeks
Year-end 2023: Stock recovers 150%+ from February lows but remains below pre-Hindenburg January 24 levels
2023 Adani saga: $150B market cap loss → partial recovery → Supreme Court probe ongoing → US DOJ charges looming (announced Nov 2024)
